heroHeadline: Kushner & Witkoff Fly to Islamabad; Ceasefire Expires in 48 Hours
heroSubtitle: Trump dispatched envoys to Islamabad for Round 2 talks starting April 20, but Iran blocked 2 more tankers from Hormuz as the April 21 ceasefire deadline approaches. Consumer sentiment hit a 46-year low; Trump warned of resuming airstrikes without a deal 'by Wednesday.'
footerNote: Aggregated intelligence from all US-based Watchboard trackers.
